Name: Flowbee
Author: Sam Hotchkiss
Description: Drive a Flowbee fleet from your Stream Deck: per-account usage gauges, goal-session (epic) status with one-tap jump to the tmux window, master-session prompts, pause/resume, and attention alerts.

Actions.Name: Account Usage
Actions.Tooltip: Usage gauge for one agent account (auto-picks by key column, or pin an account). Press to open the fleet dashboard.

Actions.Name: Goal Session
Actions.Tooltip: State of one goal session / epic — flashes red when blocked. Press to jump to its tmux window.

Actions.Name: Go to Master
Actions.Tooltip: Jump to the master session's tmux window.

Actions.Name: Prompt Master
Actions.Tooltip: Type a configured prompt into the master session (e.g. “give me the current status of all of our goals”).

Actions.Name: Pause / Resume
Actions.Tooltip: Toggle Flowbee dispatch: pause everything (or park one repo) and resume it.

Actions.Name: Attention
Actions.Tooltip: Jobs waiting on a human (needs-human, merge handoff, needs-input). Flashes when anything needs you. Press to open the dashboard.

Actions.Name: Fleet Health
Actions.Tooltip: Live vs stale workers and waiting jobs; flashes red when work is stranded with no live workers. Press to open the fleet pane.
